Video.summary: Lynn Redgrave joins Carol in "A Dirty English Movie." In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Vicki try to hide a dog.
Video.title: Lynn Redgrave

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry & Eydie Gorme salute to RKO Pictures. And tax time is stressful for Harvey in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The season-ending "Family Show" features the best variety show ensemble on television.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a prison warden responding to a riot, and a suitor whose test reaction causes havoc.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Ricardo Montalban guest. Cass joins a sketch about wallflowers, Ricardo takes a playboy role.
Video.title: Ricardo Montalban, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence, The Captain & Tennille appear in spoofs, while Steve and Carol reveal a secretary's thoughts.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Shecky Greene & Eydie Gorme join for a rundown of TV programs. Also: "Carol & Sis" & "Ironstreet & Wife."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Guest stars Steve Lawrence & Sally Struthers join in "Late, Late Movie" spoofs. Also: "The Boring Twenties."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Sally Struthers

Video.summary: Tim and Carol are conventioneers double booked in a hotel room.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Edie Adams, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guests Tom Conway and Ken Berry visit Canoga Falls in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a tribute to Vaudeville.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Joan Rivers kills with her comedy set, while The Old Folks and the 10th Avenue Family appear in sketches.
Video.title: Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars as a nurse to the accident-prone Carol. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: Guest star Ken Berry joins Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim for the musical movie spoof "Stolen Serenade."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his final season premiere! Also, new member Dick Van Dyke joins Tim for a pantomime.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ms. Betty White stars! Betty plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates. Also, Carol & Tim lose sleep.
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Pat Carroll guest. Tim plays Lone Ranger & a man who lives a dog's life. Pat joins "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson joins the Q&A. Sketches include "Carol & Sis" where the Bradfords discourage an operator.
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy." Dick Cavett crashes Q&A .
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn stars in the latest sketch with "The Family" as the pretentious director and star of a play.
Video.title: Madeline Kahn

Video.summary: A "Family Show", featuring "The Family"! Harvey and Carol can't stop making little digs at each other.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters
